id.description: Required stable id — used for `<label for>`, description, error, and the child control's id via context.

label.description: Visible label text. Required — the primitive's whole purpose is label association.

description.description: Helper text rendered below the control; wired into `aria-describedby`.

error.description: Validation error; sets `aria-invalid="true"` on opted-in controls via context.

required.description: Renders a visual required marker and exposes `required: true` on the context.

disabled.description: Propagated to opted-in controls via context. Does not style FormField itself.
